projects.name: openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级个人AI多渠道网关 | 插件化沙箱架构
projects.summary_en: Production-grade personal AI multi-channel gateway | Extensible sandboxed plugin system
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐自托管AI助手，插件生态与Docker部署首选
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for self-hosted AI assistants; strong plugin & Docker deployment
highlights_zh: 多阶段Docker + 沙箱隔离确保安全可复现
插件SDK模块导出 + 扩展检测CI优化
highlights_en: Multi-stage Docker with sandbox isolation for secure reproducibility
Modular plugin SDK + change-aware CI for extensions
concerns_zh: Bun安装依赖外部网络，离线构建需额外处理
concerns_en: Bun install relies on external network; offline builds need mitigation

projects.name: openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级多渠道AI助手 | 形式化验证与沙盒安全
projects.summary_en: Production-grade multi-channel AI assistant | Formal verification and sandbox security
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐自托管AI网关，插件SDK优秀
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for self-hosted AI gateway with excellent plugin SDK
highlights_zh: 形式化模型一致性CI检查
多架构Docker与原生跨平台支持
highlights_en: Multi-arch Docker and native cross-platform support
concerns_zh: 无正式发布版本
星标数量较低
concerns_en: No formal releases published
Relatively low star count

projects.name: QVerisBot
projects.description: Your own professional personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级跨平台AI助手 | 插件化高扩展架构
projects.summary_en: Production-grade cross-platform AI assistant | Highly extensible plugin architecture
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐用于多渠道自定义AI助手开发
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for multi-channel custom AI assistant development
highlights_zh: 多阶段Docker构建+缓存优化
20+平台插件SDK与类型导出
highlights_en: 20+ platform plugin SDKs with type exports
concerns_zh: 发布次数仅3次，版本迭代较慢
concerns_en: Only 3 releases, slower iteration pace

projects.name: cline
projects.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.
projects.summary_zh: 生产级IDE自主编码代理 | 强测试+多协议扩展
projects.summary_en: Production-grade autonomous IDE coding agent | Robust testing & MCP extensibility
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐生产使用，安全人机循环+多平台CLI
projects.recommendation_en: Strongly recommended for production; safe human-in-loop + cross-platform CLI
highlights_zh: 多平台E2E/烟雾/TUI测试+失败工件
MCP协议+任意API提供商+CLI工作区
highlights_en: Cross-platform E2E/smoke/TUI tests with failure artifacts
MCP protocol + any API provider + CLI workspace
concerns_zh: 核心TypeScript源码未直接展示（仅配置与工作流）
concerns_en: Core TypeScript source not directly shown (only configs & workflows)

projects.name: kimi-cli
projects.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
projects.summary_zh: 生产级终端 AI 代理 | 跨平台高可扩展
projects.summary_en: Production-grade Terminal AI Agent | Cross-platform & Highly Extensible
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐用于 AI 辅助开发与 IDE 集成
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for AI-assisted development & IDE integration
highlights_zh: ruff+pyright 严格检查与多平台 CI
MCP/ACP 支持及二进制跨平台构建
concerns_zh: 内置 shell 命令如 cd 暂不支持
concerns_en: Built-in shell commands like cd not yet supported

projects.name: zeroclaw
projects.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀
projects.summary_zh: 生产级多渠道AI助手 | 可持续性Rust基建
projects.summary_en: Production-grade multi-channel AI assistant | Sustainable Rust infrastructure
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐本地个人部署，远超OpenClaw
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for local personal deployment over OpenClaw
highlights_zh: 34模块精准分离（agent/channels/hardware/plugins）
fuzz/benches/tests+clippy/rustfmt/deny.toml
concerns_zh: Cargo.toml依赖细节未在样本中直接可见
concerns_en: Cargo.toml dependency details not directly visible in provided samples

projects.name: localclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant configured to work WELL with small, open-source models. Built on Openclaw.
projects.summary_zh: 本地优先AI助手 | 正式验证多平台框架
projects.summary_en: Local-first AI assistant | Formally verified multi-platform framework
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合个人小开源模型本地部署
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for personal local deployment with small open models
highlights_zh: 正式模型一致性检查覆盖路由/安全/幂等
插件SDK+多平台原生支持
highlights_en: Plugin SDK with native multi-platform support
concerns_zh: GitHub Releases数量为0
concerns_en: Zero official GitHub Releases

projects.name: nanoclaw
projects.description: A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK
projects.summary_zh: 轻量容器化Claude助手 | 极致可理解与安全
projects.summary_en: Lightweight containerized Claude assistant | Ultimate understandability & security
projects.recommendation_zh: 个人用户首选：Fork后用Claude Code定制
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for individuals: fork & customize via Claude Code
highlights_zh: 单一进程+少量文件，代码库小到Claude可全 walkthrough
真容器隔离（Docker/Apple Container），非应用级权限
highlights_en: Single process + handful files; codebase tiny enough for Claude walkthrough
True container isolation (Docker/Apple Container), not app-level checks
concerns_zh: 依赖Claude Code进行定制与维护，无传统配置文件
尚无正式发布（0 releases），依赖GitHub技能分支
concerns_en: Customization/maintenance relies on Claude Code, no traditional config
No official releases (0 published), skill branches on GitHub

projects.name: autobot
projects.description: Ultra-efficient personal AI assistant powered by Crystal
projects.summary_zh: 超高效个人AI助手 | Crystal内核沙箱
projects.summary_en: Ultra-efficient personal AI assistant | Crystal kernel sandbox
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐高性能安全AI代理生产部署
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for high-perf secure AI agents

Docker/bubblewrap内核隔离
concerns_zh: 仅3位贡献者，社区规模有限
concerns_en: Only 3 contributors, limited community

projects.name: microclaw
projects.description: 🦀An agentic AI assistant that lives in your chats, inspired by nanoclaw and incorporating some of its design ideas. Built with Rust 🦀
projects.summary_zh: 生产级 Rust AI 聊天代理 | 高可持续多平台支持
projects.summary_en: Production-grade Rust AI chat agent | High sustainability and portability
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐生产部署，CI/Nix 保障可靠

模块化 workspace 与 Nixpkgs 自动化

依赖生态复杂（多 crates + 外部库）
concerns_en: Security audit ignores RUSTSEC-2026-0049
Complex dependency ecosystem

projects.name: openclaw-cn
projects.description: 中文社区版OpenClaw，同原版保持定期更新，已内置钉钉、企业微信、飞书、QQ以及国内网络环境优化。你的专属个人AI助手。支持所有操作系统和平台。🦞

projects.name: gptme

projects.name: FlyEnv
projects.description: Lightweight Native Local Dev Toolbox for Windows, macOS & Linux. Run OpenClaw/n8n/Apache/Nginx/Caddy/Tomcat/PHP/Node.js/Bun/Deno/Python/Java/Go/Ruby/Perl/Rust/Erlang/MySQL/PostgreSQL/MariaDB/MongoDB/Redis/RabbitMQ/Mailpit/Elasticsearch without Docker. projects.name: safeclaw
projects.description: Safeclaw is the alternative to openclaw.. You can naturally chat with it via text and voice, and you can choose not to use a language model., By default it picks up on intent and semantics..  No prompt injection while you get over ninety percent of what openclaw does plus tts and voice to text

Missing autonomous multi-step tasks

projects.name: notebooklm-py
projects.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

自修改机制引入潜在维护风险
concerns_en: No CI/CD, no releases, single contributor
Self-modification introduces maintenance risks

projects.name: openzca

projects.summary_zh: 开源 Zalo CLI | OpenClaw 插件完美集成

projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐 OpenClaw 集成，建议拆分 CLI 单文件
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for OpenClaw integration; refactor monolithic CLI

projects.name: Claudable
projects.description: Claudable is an open-source web builder that leverages local CLI agents, such as Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Qwen Code, and Cursor Agent, to build and deploy products effortlessly.
projects.summary_zh: 开源AI驱动Web构建器 | 本地多CLI代理集成
projects.summary_en: Open-source AI-Powered Web Builder | Local Multi-CLI Agent Integration
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合原型开发，推荐本地AI CLI快速迭代
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for rapid prototyping with local AI CLIs
highlights_zh: 支持Claude/Codex/Cursor/Qwen等多代理
零配置Vercel部署+Supabase集成
concerns_zh: 贡献者仅4人且无CI/CD
package.json仓库URL为yourusername占位符
concerns_en: Only 4 contributors and no CI/CD
Placeholder 'yourusername' repository URL in package.json

projects.name: angel-claw
projects.description: Lean. Compatible. Based OpenClaw. Python ❤️

projects.summary_en: Lean Multi-Tenant Agent OS | Strong extensibility, limited code verification
projects.recommendation_zh: 个人试用推荐，生产前审计源码加CI
projects.recommendation_en: Recommend personal use; audit source & add CI for prod
highlights_zh: 详尽CHANGELOG+DEPLOY指南
动态自定义技能+MCP支持
concerns_zh: 无CI/CD+单贡献者
线程池沙箱（非进程隔离）
无实际.py代码证据验证加密/限流
concerns_en: No CI/CD + single contributor
Thread-pool sandbox (not process isolation)
No verifiable .py code for encryption/limits

projects.name: subzeroclaw
projects.summary_zh: 极简C单文件代理 | 边缘裸金属执行

projects.recommendation_zh: 仅限单设备测试，生产环境禁用

零框架纯popen循环

Single contributor no CI/CD no releases

projects.name: ZeroClaw-Android
projects.description: Run AI agents 24/7 on your Android phone. Native Rust core, 25+ providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek,         Ollama), encrypted key storage, plugin browser, Material You UI. Self-hosted alternative to Mac Mini setups. MIT           licensed.
projects.summary_zh: 已归档实验性AI代理项目 | 代码不安全警示
projects.summary_en: Archived Experimental AI Agent Project | Unsafe Code Warning
projects.recommendation_zh: 不建议使用，存在安全风险
projects.recommendation_en: Not recommended due to safety risks
highlights_zh: 支持25+ LLM提供商
Rust原生核心
concerns_zh: 项目已正式归档
作者承认几乎全AI生成代码且不安全
